Categorie

Databases

7 reviewed packages available for Databases.

DBeaver Community

dbeaver

Universal open-source database management client.

  • Linux
  • macOS
  • Windows

MariaDB

mariadb

Community-developed relational database compatible with MySQL.

  • Alpine
  • Arch
  • Debian
  • Fedora
  • macOS
  • Windows

MongoDB Compass

mongodb-compass

Graphical user interface for MongoDB databases.

  • Linux
  • macOS
  • Windows

MySQL

mysql

Relational database server and client from Oracle.

  • Alpine
  • Arch
  • Debian
  • Fedora
  • macOS
  • Windows

PostgreSQL

postgresql

Open-source object-relational database server and client tools.

  • Alpine
  • Arch
  • Debian
  • Fedora
  • macOS
  • openSUSE
  • Windows

Redis

redis

In-memory data store used as a cache, database, and message broker.

  • Alpine
  • Arch
  • Debian
  • Fedora
  • macOS
  • Windows

SQLite

sqlite

Small self-contained relational database engine and CLI.

  • Alpine
  • Arch
  • Debian
  • Fedora
  • macOS
  • openSUSE
  • Windows

Catalog 2026.07.13.1 · bundled development fixture; CLI authentication is authoritative

Source and releases (configured by the deploying repository) · No runtime backend
